title: Fill in a mirror cell
excerpt:

posts.author: CCabourg (Christophe Cabourg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,
I added a mirror column to automatically display an employee’s company. Everything works because when I select a contact in the connected column, the company he works to is displayed in the mirror column. I can then modify the company by clicking in the cell of the mirror column.
What I can not do: Enter a value in a cell of the mirror column if nothing has been entered in the connected column. Support would be appreciated !! Thanks in advance

posts.author: MikeB_Axanexa (Mike Buckiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There!

That is by design because if you do not have an item connected from the other board, the mirrored column will not allow you to enter values into the mirrored column.

Can you provide context of tour workflow on how you would like this to work? We are here to facilitate these kinds of builds and happy to help if needed. Here is our website:

Axanexa

Business Automation and Workflows

We create automations and workflows you didn't think were possible. Streamline your operations, eliminate wasted employee hours, and improve your bottom line.

Mike B
Automation Architect
AXANEXA
